_comment: Template. Copy into data/manual/<source>/<year>.json. One row per (country, year, sector, variable).
_schema: country, year (int), sector in {solar_pv,wind,batteries,evs}, variable in {capacity,production,demand}, value (float), unit (str), source (citation), is_forecast (bool), notes (str), priority (int; higher wins)
source: BNEF Global Lithium-Ion Battery Supply Chain Ranking 2024, Exhibit 4
